title: Popchestra Maxed Out 2026
description: Taylor Swift. Katy Perry. Justin Timberlake. Backstreet Boys. Britney Spears. One man is behind the song writing power of some of the biggest hits on the planet. Come and experience our orchestral tribute to Max Martin, the most famous songwriter you have never heard of! Returning after a triumphant debut at Brighton Fringe 2025, we have added even more bangers to our setlist. So get ready for a fun filled evening, where we are bringing the depth and drama of classical music to the feel-good factor of your favourite pop hits!
